basicInfo.name: Nightmare Yui
basicInfo.flavor: Although Yui is young, she is recognized as a great prodigy because of her incredible musical skills. She is revered by all troubadours as a maestro.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Magic Attack Reduction. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Healing Melody
Skill 1.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Continuous Healing. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Skill 2.name: Battle Melody
Skill 2.desc:
2 Allies
 - Revives fallen target(s) with 35% HP.

Passive.name: Battle Bard
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Burn Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Burn Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
Yui was born to a pair of bards in a small village in Dragon Ruins.
Even from a young age, she'd often wander from town to town on her father's heels. During these journeys, she'd often get caught up in her daydreams and wander off the path. This rather dangerous tendency ended up fostering something much greater: an innate talent for telling stories.
This led to her striking out on her own at a young age to make her own songs. Since she was well-travelled and well-mannered, it was quite easy for her to capture hearts in every town she visited.
Both of her parents died an early and unfortunate death. She stepped in to fill their void as the singing voice in their troupe.
She was rescued by Evan's crew in the Blazing Desert while on the way back to her hometown. Their meeting there was brief, but they met again at Dragon Ruins, where the crew helped to save her adoptive hometown.
She joined the Evan Expedition out of a sense of gratitude. She recorded all of their exploits into song, which have come to be widely regarded as the most accurate primary source of the events that transpired.
